prompt: [Retained Customers] = customers who purchased in the selected month AND also in the immediately preceding month; plus [Retention Rate] = retained / customers active in the prior month. Retail-v2.

assertions.text: Gets the distinct set of customers active in the current period (e.g. VALUES('Customer'[Customer ID]) constrained to rows with sales, or CALCULATETABLE of customers with sales)
Gets the distinct customers active in the PRIOR month via a shifted date context (DATEADD(...,-1,MONTH) or PREVIOUSMONTH inside CALCULATETABLE)
Intersects the two customer sets to find retained customers (INTERSECT, or FILTER ... IN / COUNTROWS over the intersection)
Counts retained with COUNTROWS and computes the rate with DIVIDE over the prior-month active count
Uses multiple VARs to hold the current-set, prior-set, and counts; references only existing columns
